'''''Draklor''''' was a [[Star Galleon-class frigate|''Star Galleon''-class frigate]] serving in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] under [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]. The ship was dispatched by the Grand Admiral as part of the ''[[Death's Head]]'' to ferry [[Joruus C'baoth]] and [[General/Legends|General]] [[Freja Covell]] from his flagship, the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']] to the [[Mount Tantiss/Legends|Mount Tantiss]] base on [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last Command]]'' {{Ab|The Last Command (unabridged audiobook)}}
